results.edited_description: The IFA is a leading professional accountancy body dedicated to supporting SMEs and SMPs with compliance and planning expertise. Our members are recognised by HM Treasury, FCA, and other regulatory bodies, making us the ideal partner for accounting professionals serving small businesses.

results.description: Accounting for Sustainability (A4S) is a charitable organization founded by His Majesty King Charles III to help finance professionals integrate sustainability into business decision-making. decision_makers.title: Executive Chair

She has been instrumental in establishing the International Integrated Reporting Council and the Taskforce on Climate-related Financial Disclosures.

decision_makers.name: Helen Slinger

decision_makers.name: Kerry Perkins
